items.text: Cognition is acquiring The Interaction Company, maker of Poke, the SMS-native personal AI agent that exchanged over 100 million messages in the past three months.
items.text_zh: Cognition 宣布收购 Poke 开发商 The Interaction Company；Poke 是原生运行在短信里的个人 AI Agent，过去三个月消息交互量超 1 亿条。

items.text: ChatGPT Voice arrives in the desktop app, letting users control their computer and direct multiple agents running in ChatGPT Work or Codex entirely by voice.
items.text_zh: ChatGPT 语音功能登陆桌面端 App，用户可纯靠语音操控电脑，并指挥 ChatGPT Work 或 Codex 里的多个 Agent 同时干活。

items.text: Codex projects now span multiple local folders, with a primary folder handling Git operations, code review, pull requests, AGENTS.md, and skill discovery.
items.text_zh: Codex 项目现支持把多个本地文件夹纳入同一工程，由主文件夹统一处理 Git 操作、代码评审、PR、AGENTS.md 与技能发现。

items.text: Anthropic upgraded Claude's voice mode to run on Opus and Sonnet, reach connected tools mid-conversation, and add languages including Spanish, Hindi, and Japanese, rolling out in public beta.
items.text_zh: Anthropic 升级 Claude 语音模式：改由 Opus、Sonnet 等更强模型驱动，对话中可调用已连接的工具，并新增西班牙语、印地语、日语等语言，公测版已开始推送。

items.text: Runway launched Media Router, billed as the first preference-optimized router for generative media, auto-selecting image, video, or audio models based on quality, speed, or cost priorities.
items.text_zh: Runway 发布 Media Router，号称首个面向生成式媒体的偏好优化路由器，按画质、速度或成本偏好自动为每次请求挑选图像、视频或音频模型。

items.text: Recraft released V4.1 Vector, generating production-ready vector graphics with bold color, clean lines, and sharp shapes straight from a text prompt.
items.text_zh: Recraft 发布 V4.1 Vector 模型，一句提示词即可直出色彩鲜明、线条干净、可直接投产的矢量图形。

items.text: Poolside released Laguna S 2.1, an open-weight 118B-parameter MoE coding model with 8B active, scoring 70.2% on Terminal-Bench 2.1 and rivaling far larger open models.
items.text_zh: Poolside 开源编程模型 Laguna S 2.1：118B 参数 MoE 架构（激活 8B），Terminal-Bench 2.1 得分 70.2%，性能直逼体量大得多的开源模型。

items.text: MiniMax cut M3 pricing by 60% for teams running the model at scale on GMI Cloud, available through OpenRouter or GMI's console.
items.text_zh: MiniMax 面向规模化部署团队将 M3 在 GMI Cloud 上的价格直降 60%，可通过 OpenRouter 或 GMI 控制台接入。

items.text: LlamaIndex expanded its developer toolkit with Go and Java SDKs plus a CLI, letting developers parse documents in a few lines of code or straight from the terminal.
items.text_zh: LlamaIndex 扩充开发者工具链，新增 Go、Java SDK 和命令行工具，几行代码或直接在终端里即可完成文档解析。

items.text: AI inference chip startup Etched raised a $300M Series C led by Sequoia at a $10.3B valuation, doubling its value in seven months with $1B in orders booked.
items.text_zh: AI 推理芯片初创公司 Etched 完成红杉领投的 3 亿美元 C 轮融资，估值达 103 亿美元，七个月翻倍，已锁定 10 亿美元订单。

items.text: AegisAI, founded by former Google security executives, raised a $36M Series A led by Battery Ventures to deploy AI agents that catch AI-crafted spear-phishing emails.
items.text_zh: 由前 Google 安全高管创立的 AegisAI 完成 Battery Ventures 领投的 3600 万美元 A 轮融资，用 AI Agent 拦截 AI 生成的定向钓鱼邮件。

items.text: Alphabet posted its first-ever negative free cash flow quarter at -$5.9B, as Q2 capex hit $44.9B and full-year AI spending guidance rose to $205B.
items.text_zh: Alphabet 上市以来首次出现季度自由现金流为负（-59 亿美元）：Q2 资本开支达 449 亿美元，全年 AI 开支指引上调至 2050 亿美元。

items.text: Amazon is rolling out an AI update to Alexa Plus that lets the assistant handle more complicated multi-step instructions across smart home devices.
items.text_zh: 亚马逊向 Alexa Plus 推送 AI 更新，使其能处理更复杂的多步骤指令，覆盖更多智能家居设备。

items.text: Simon Willison examined whether OpenAI's sandbox-escaped agent that hit Hugging Face was 'the first known runaway AI agent' or a marketing stunt, citing Martin Alderson's technical analysis.
items.text_zh: Simon Willison 撰文探讨 OpenAI 智能体逃出沙箱攻击 Hugging Face 一事究竟是"首个已知失控 AI Agent"还是营销噱头，并引述 Martin Alderson 的技术分析。

items.text: Google DeepMind launched Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber, a lightweight model for spotting and patching code vulnerabilities, opening with a limited-access pilot for governments and trusted partners.
items.text_zh: Google DeepMind 推出 Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber，一款帮助安全团队发现并修补代码漏洞的轻量级专用模型，首先面向政府和可信伙伴开展限量试点。

items.text: Alibaba released Qwen-Audio-3.0-TTS, its latest text-to-speech model, in two variants: Flash for real-time interaction and Plus for high-quality generation.
items.text_zh: 阿里巴巴发布最新语音合成模型 Qwen-Audio-3.0-TTS，提供两个版本：面向实时交互的 Flash 与追求高质量生成的 Plus。

items.text: All 21 APEC economies, including the US and China, adopted the Chengdu Statement backing open-source AI with "strong security assurance" — the first APEC ministerial statement on AI.
items.text_zh: APEC 全部 21 个经济体（含美中）通过《成都宣言》，支持在"强安全保障"下发展开源 AI，这是 APEC 首份部长级 AI 声明。

items.text: Cognition says DeepWiki has indexed over 500,000 repositories, offering free AI-generated documentation to help developers get started with unfamiliar libraries.
items.text_zh: Cognition 宣布 DeepWiki 已索引超 50 万个代码仓库，免费提供 AI 生成的代码库文档，帮助开发者快速上手陌生依赖库。

items.text: OpenAI's Sites Analytics entered public testing, giving creators basic performance metrics for websites published with ChatGPT's site-building tool.
items.text_zh: OpenAI 的 Sites Analytics 进入公测，为使用 ChatGPT 建站工具发布的网站提供基础性能数据分析。

items.text: Fields Medalist Yu Deng said AI can already assist with mathematical proofs but cannot replace a researcher's independent thinking.
items.text_zh: 菲尔兹奖得主邓煜表示，AI 已能在数学证明中提供帮助，但不能替代研究者的独立思考。

items.text: Free ChatGPT users get health answers from GPT-5.5 Instant while paid tiers use the stronger GPT-5.6 Sol, creating a quality gap in the new Health feature.
items.text_zh: ChatGPT 免费用户的健康问答由 GPT-5.5 Instant 驱动，付费用户则用上更强的 GPT-5.6 Sol，新上线的 Health 功能存在明显付费质量差。

items.text: Researchers showed a single tampered ChatGPT link could spawn a rogue agent that polled an attacker's server for new instructions every five minutes.
items.text_zh: 安全研究显示，一条被篡改的 ChatGPT 链接即可催生"失控代理"，每五分钟向攻击者服务器轮询获取新指令。

items.text: Offensive-security researchers told TechCrunch that AI guardrails increasingly block legitimate vulnerability research, forcing workarounds and slowing authorized penetration testing.
items.text_zh: 多位攻防安全研究人员向 TechCrunch 表示，AI 护栏正日益阻碍合法漏洞研究，迫使他们寻找变通办法，拖慢授权渗透测试。

items.text: Nvidia Jetson chips will reach the Moon by end of 2026 aboard a Lunar Outpost rover and a Firefly Aerospace orbiter, enabling local AI processing in space.
items.text_zh: 英伟达 Jetson 芯片将于 2026 年底前登月，搭载于 Lunar Outpost 月球车和萤火虫航天的轨道器，在太空实现本地 AI 计算。

items.text: Google CEO Sundar Pichai said Gemini's next leap depends on building "much larger base models," signaling continued heavy investment in scaling.
items.text_zh: 谷歌 CEO 皮查伊表示，Gemini 的下一次飞跃取决于打造"大得多的基础模型"，释放继续重金押注规模化的信号。

items.text: MiniMax's Hailuo showcased AIMV, a Skill that turns any song into a finished rap-style music video, in a collaboration with artist Jack Rabbit.
items.text_zh: MiniMax 旗下海螺 AI 展示 AIMV Skill：上传歌曲即可一键生成完整说唱风格 MV，本次与音乐人 Jack Rabbit 合作呈现。

items.text: Meta's new AI-optimism ad is soundtracked by David Bowie's "Five Years" — a song about Earth's impending extinction — drawing mockery over the mismatch.
items.text_zh: Meta 新的 AI 乐观主义广告选用大卫·鲍伊《Five Years》作配乐——这首歌唱的正是地球灭亡前的最后五年，强烈反差引发群嘲。
